name: opencode-Playwright-browser-plugin
description: Self-contained browser automation plugin for OpenCode — Playwright-powered, no MCP server needed
author: AWhileLater

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try { require('child_process').execSync('npx playwright install chromium 2>&1', { stdio: 'inherit' }) } catch(e) { console.error('Failed to install Chromium. Run manually: npx playwright install chromium') }"
scripts.postupdate: node -e "try { require('child_process').execSync('npx playwright install chromium 2>&1', { stdio: 'inherit' }) } catch(e) { console.error('Failed to install Chromium. Run manually: npx playwright install chromium') }"
